main_visual_title:
Transforming industrial operations

main_industry: DEEP.FINE's proven technology validated across diverse industries
main_subtitle_our: DEEP.FINE provides industrial AI solutions that solve real-world challenges in logistics, manufacturing/MRO, and spatial data fields.
main_our_item_txt_1: LOGI.FINE is a solution that supports warehouse picking, inspection, sorting, and packing operations based on smart glasses and Vision AI.
main_our_item_tit_2: AI Glass-Based On-Site Workflow Support Solution
main_our_item_txt_2:
DAO is a solution that provides the necessary information for inspection and maintenance tasks on manufacturing, MRO, and defense sites 
 via smart glasses, supporting workers in their on-site operations.
main_our_item_tit_3: Spatial Computing-Based Digital Space Construction Solution
main_our_item_txt_3:
DSC is a solution that builds real-world spaces into 3D spatial data 
 and combines positioning awareness with AR content to realize space-based services.
main_title_work:
We Transform 
 How Industrial Sites Work
main_subtitle_work: We perceive spaces, digitize operations, and accelerate the AX transformation of industrial management.
main_work_item_txt_1: Recognizes real-world environments and structures them into 3D spatial data, transforming industrial site spatial information into operational assets.
main_work_item_txt_2: Recognizes images, barcodes, equipment, and tasks from the worker’s perspective to support inspection, auditing, and photo/video-based task logging.
main_work_item_subTit_3: Task Log Analysis · API Integration · Dashboard
main_work_item_txt_3: Analyzes task logs, photo/video records, errors, and processing time data to identify operational bottlenecks and support workflow optimization.
main_why_txt_3: Global Enterprises & Public Sector Clients and Partners
main_why_txt_4: No.1 Smart Glass Adoption in Korea
main_subtitle_why: Operation Log Analysis · API Integration · Dashboard

product_visual_title: Turn real-world spaces into data with AI and control them intelligently
product_visual_subtitle: 설비 번호를 스캔하면 도면·매뉴얼이 눈앞에 뜨고, 음성 명령으로 체크리스트를 완료하고, 작업 결과가 자동으로 기록됩니다. 장갑을 낀 채로, 두 손은 자유롭게.
product_problem_text: Before DAO. After DAO. A Different Operation
product_as_list_tit_1: Fewer Skilled Workers, Decisions Still Driven by Experience
product_as_list_txt_1: As skilled workers decline, field operations still depend on human experience and judgment.
product_as_list_tit_2: Time Loss Due to Redundant Work
product_as_list_txt_2: Manual records from the field are entered again in the office, resulting in repetitive and inefficient workflows.
product_as_list_tit_3: Paper-Based Data, Hard to Search and Analyze
product_as_list_txt_3: Work records are stored on paper or in personal files,  making them difficult to retrieve when needed.
product_as_list_tit_4: High Costs Associated with Long-Distance Inspections
product_as_list_txt_4: On-site visits by experts lead to excessive travel costs.
product_to_list_tit_1: Instant Access via Equipment ID Recognition
product_to_list_tit_2: Scan an equipment ID to instantly access drawings, manuals, and checklists in view.
product_to_list_txt_2: Complete checklists and record work evidence—all with voice commands.
product_to_list_tit_3: Automatic Digitization of All Work Data
product_to_list_txt_3: Automatically save and sync checklists, photos, and voice notes—available anytime.
product_to_list_tit_4: Solve Problems Through Remote Collaboration, Without Travel
product_to_list_txt_4: Experts provide remote AR guidance—eliminating the need for on-site visits.

dao_result_txt_1: Remote safety inspections of facilities across Gyeonggi Province, implementation effects of AR work guides in the shipbuilding industry
dao_result_txt_2: Establishment of a predictive maintenance (MRO) system for manufacturing equipment

dao_case_tit_1_1:
Remote Safety Inspection Using Smart Glasses
for Facility Safety Inspection Across Gyeonggi-do
dao_case_txt_1_1: Share real-time on-site footage through smart glasses to provide live consulting on maintenance and reinforcement measures.
dao_case_txt_1_2:
Previously, about 40% of facility safety inspections were conducted remotely,
reducing travel time and costs by 60% and increasing civil complaint processing rates by 3 times.
dao_case_etc_1_3: Remote Multi-Site Inspection by a Single Expert
dao_case_tit_2_1: Continuous Monitoring System for Efficient Safety Management in Construction
dao_case_txt_2_1:
Built a remote site management platform to manage construction sites in real time
by supporting a wide range of smart device integrations, including smart glasses and unmanned drones through REMOTE.
dao_case_txt_2_2: Perform safety inspection items using smart glasses, providing a standardized business workflow.
dao_case_tit_3_1:
Quality Control & Hygiene Status Inspection Methods
for Domestic and Global Suppliers of Food Enterprises
dao_case_txt_3_1: Enabled domestic/global supplier quality control and non-face-to-face A/S processing through REMOTE.
dao_case_txt_3_2: Conducted factory hygiene inspection and safety management independently using smart glasses via DAO Workflow, improving productivity by 34%.
dao_case_txt_4_1: Through smart glasses, DEEP.FINE's hyper-realistic XR manual and immersive, virtual, remote Mercedes-Benz vehicle guidance service allow customers and dealers to communicate conveniently regarding Mercedes' technology and exceptional interior/exterior designs without visiting the store in person, thereby leading the paradigm of future metaverse digital consumption.
dao_case_tit_5_1: AI Blueprint Visualization Solution for Large Vessel Maintenance
dao_case_txt_5_1: Resolved complex blueprint interpretation issues and skilled labor shortages during large vessel maintenance through AR glasses-based real-time task guides and remote expert support.
dao_case_txt_5_2:
Scanning equipment numbers with Vision Assist instantly displays blueprints and task instructions,
cutting maintenance time by 30% and shortening new worker OJT periods by 40%.
dao_case_etc_5_3: 40% Shortening of New Worker OJT Period
dao_subtitle_faq: People and Organizational Structure Leading DEEP.FINE's Innovation
dao_banner_text:
Our experts will propose a tailored implementation plan optimized for your site operations.
Feel free to reach out to us.
ceo_subtitle: DEEP.FINE is transforming industrial operations through AI and Spatial Computing technology.
ceo_txt_0: DEEP.FINE is transforming industrial operations through AI and Spatial Computing technology.
ceo_text_1: We connect on-site operational data with spatial data to standardize tasks that previously relied on manual labor and individual experience, shifting toward a safer, more efficient operational framework. Smart glasses, Vision AI, VPS, and 3D spatial data technology serve as the core foundations of DEEP.FINE to realize this vision.
ceo_text_2: DEEP.FINE has consistently validated and commercialized its technology alongside customers in logistics, manufacturing, shipbuilding & heavy industry, MRO, tourism, and public sectors.
ceo_text_3: Building upon these proven technologies, we are now expanding into a wider range of job sites and industries to deliver industrial AX solutions proven by our customers' success.
our_teams_subtitle_1: We develop the core technologies that realize DEEP.FINE's Spatial AI and industrial operational solutions. From Vision AI, 3D spatial mapping, and VPS to cloud systems and smart glass applications, we build the technological foundation that works directly on the job site.
our_teams_list_1_1: AI & Vision Development: Developing industrial scene recognition, object recognition, Vision AI, and AI Agent technologies.
our_teams_list_1_2: Platform Development: Building cloud architectures, backends, APIs, and data processing infrastructures.
our_teams_list_1_3: Application Development: Creating mobile, web, smart glass, and XR-based on-site applications.
our_teams_list_1_4: Spatial Computing Development: Advancing VPS, 3D mapping, indoor positioning, and spatial data processing technologies.
our_teams_subtitle_2: We translate industrial site requirements into actual product and service experiences. We analyze client workflows to design interfaces, features, contents, and deployment structures that users can easily navigate on-site.
our_teams_list_2_1: Product Planning: Establishing solution direction, feature prioritization, and product roadmaps.
our_teams_list_2_2: UX/UI Design: Designing user experiences tailored for web, mobile, smart glass, and XR environments.
our_teams_list_2_3: Project Management: Managing PoCs, system deployment, client requirements, schedules, and deliverables.
our_teams_list_2_4: Content & Service Design: Creating 3D assets, manuals, operational scenarios, and field-optimized service content.
our_teams_subtitle_3: We manage HR, finance, general affairs, legal affairs, and internal operational frameworks to ensure DEEP.FINE's sustainable growth. We create an environment where team members can fully focus on product development and client relations, enhancing the stability and efficiency of organizational operations.
our_teams_list_3_1: Finance & Accounting: Managing accounting, funding, budgeting, settlements, and financial reporting.
our_teams_list_3_2: HR & Culture: Overseeing recruitment, onboarding, performance evaluations, organizational culture, and employee experiences.
our_teams_list_3_3: General Affairs & Asset Management: Supporting workplace environments, assets, contracts, procurement, and administrative tasks.
our_teams_list_3_4: Operations Support: Facilitating internal processes, documentation, compliance, and workflow optimization.
our_teams_subtitle_4: We bridge DEEP.FINE's technology and solutions with market opportunities and customer demands. We accelerate business growth and expand brand awareness through enterprise clients, strategic partnerships, exhibitions, PR, and digital marketing.
our_teams_list_4_1: Enterprise Sales: Identifying enterprise clients, managing sales pipelines, and handling strategic accounts.
our_teams_list_4_2: Strategic Partnerships: Establishing collaborative frameworks with corporate groups, public institutions, and industry-specific partners.
our_teams_list_4_3: Marketing Strategy: Planning campaigns, exhibitions, PR, content creation, and lead generation.
our_teams_list_4_4: Brand Communication: Strengthening brand awareness and credibility across online and offline channels.

main_visual_subtitle_2:
